# Minneapolis Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Minneapolis bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

## About
minneapolisbankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Minneapolis Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide: https://minneapolisbankruptcy.org/
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Minneapolis -- Eligibility, Exemptions, Timeline: https://minneapolisbankruptcy.org/chapter-7.html
- Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Minneapolis -- Payment Plans, Dismissal Rates, Timeline: https://minneapolisbankruptcy.org/chapter-13.html
- Minnesota Bankruptcy Exemptions -- What You Can Keep -- Minneapolis: https://minneapolisbankruptcy.org/exemptions.html
- How Much Does Bankruptcy Cost in Minneapolis? -- Filing Fees, Attorney Fees: https://minneapolisbankruptcy.org/cost.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
